Video.summary: The story of Aaron Winters, his wife Rosie and their discovery of borax in Death Valley.
Video.title: She Burns Green

Video.summary: Two people set out into the desert in search of the lost Pegleg gold mine.
Video.title: The Lost Pegleg Mine

Video.summary: A miner is encouraged by a dance-hall girl to study law after he loses an arm in a shooting fracas.
Video.title: Self-Made Man

Video.summary: A butterfly collector comes to Death Valley and not only finds moths but discovers his true love.
Video.title: The Chivaree

Video.summary: An embittered prospector denies his wife a purple silk dress.
Video.title: Cynthy's Dream Dress

Video.summary: Mary Helen Crosby conceals government papers in her umbrella to insure their safe arrival.
Video.title: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Image.alt: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Video.summary: Two men must find a way to stake a claim without going to jail.
Video.title: The Bandits of Panamint

Video.summary: A young Mormon wife takes drastic measures to cope with life on the prairie.
Video.title: Sego Lilies

Video.summary: A society belle finds herself living in Carson City, Nev., known as Little Washington.
Video.title: Little Washington

Video.summary: The town drunk Solomon asks the current newspaper owner to aid in his tall tales to his sister.
Video.title: Solomon in All His Glory

Video.summary: A territorial dispute threatens the border town of Aurora and a young couple's love.
Video.title: Which Side of the Fence?

Video.summary: A little girl grows up to become a performer in a vaudeville show.
Video.title: Lotta Crabtree

Video.summary: John Thompson wants to get the mail out during the winters and comes up with ways to make it happen.
Video.title: Snowshoe Thompson

Video.summary: A teacher stages a holdup as a joke but decides to make a career of it.
Video.title: Black Bart The PO8

Video.summary: Two partner prospectors sell out to the wealthy Spencer Gates and their lives take different paths.
Video.title: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Image.alt: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Video.summary: The story of Cherokee tribesman Sequoia, who developed the Cherokee written language.
Video.title: Sequoia

Video.summary: A tenderfoot becomes a swamper with the Big Team to prove his worth to the girl he loves.
Video.title: The Big Team Rolls

Video.summary: Depositing his gold in San Francisco, a prospector encounters the temptations of the big city.
Video.title: Riggs and Riggs

Video.summary: Prospectors offer a friend shares in their mine if he'll marry the homely Aggie Filene.
Video.title: Million Dollar Wedding

Video.summary: Wagon train members oppose their leader's desire to observe Sunday as a day of rest.
Video.title: The Seventh Day

Video.summary: A quiet dressmaker for the dance hall girls in a Western mining camp is discovered to be Tiger Lil.
Video.title: The Little Dressmaker of Bodie

Video.summary: Zack and Zeke, slaves from Louisville, seek to buy their freedom by digging for gold.
Video.title: Land of the Free

Video.summary: Bandits board a gold-carrying ship and murder most of the passengers and crew.
Video.title: I Am Joaquin

Video.summary: Blind and bitter Susie witnesses a stage robbery and her heightened senses play a key role.
Video.title: Sixth Sense

Video.summary: The tumultuous life of Lola Montez, a dancer who goes through fame and several fortunes.
Video.title: Lola Montez

Video.summary: A prospector strikes it rich and decides to marry the girl he left behind.
Video.title: Love 'Em and Leave 'Em

Video.summary: A desert dwelling couple struggle with life in Death Valley.
Video.title: Dress for a Desert Girl

Video.summary: Life on the prairie is anything but easy for a newly married Swedish immigrant.
Video.title: Britta Goes Home

Video.summary: Impoverished homesteader Aaron makes a discovery with the potential to earn a fortune.
Video.title: Green Is the Color of Gold

Image.alt: Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold

Video.summary: Jesse Martin stirs up a town: he claims there's a payload of gold lying right beneath Main Street.
Video.title: Gold Mine on Main Street

Video.summary: Prospectors venture into Death Valley to find a legendary lost mine.
Video.title: A Friend Indeed

Video.summary: Wagonmaster Lassen faces an unruly mob when he tries a new route to California in the 1840s.
Video.title: The Other Side of the Mountain

Image.alt: The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain

Video.summary: A woman's love inspires an aspiring preacher to stand up to a bully.
Video.title: The Other Cheek

Video.summary: John Parker was raised by Comanches since he was a boy and wants to remain with his Native family.
Video.title: The Understanding

Video.summary: A frontier couple battle Natives, outlaws and a government-issued land grant to save their ranch.
Video.title: Here Stands Bailey

Video.summary: Two outlaws devise a mining operation and finance it with stolen bullion.
Video.title: How to Beat a Badman

Video.summary: George Parker's friend Michael encourages his rebellious ways and suggests he even change his name.
Video.title: Drop Out

Video.summary: Lucia Darling moves to Montana to start a school but faces many challenges.
Video.title: Lucia Darling and the Ostrich

Video.summary: The honeymoon is over when Jim Dayton's wife stumbles onto his past.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Bonanza

Video.summary: A sheriff schemes to win an interest in California's wine industry.
Video.title: The Man Who Planted Gold in California

Image.alt: The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California

Video.summary: As a nun aids a wounded robber, she learns he is a friend of the notorious Billy the Kid.
Video.title: Lost Sheep in Trinidad
